_scenario: Send $50K USDC where: (a) the user signs with chain id 1 but intends Polygon (137) — chain ID mismatch; (b) the recipient address is a lookalike planted by a dust attacker (matches 6+4 chars of a real prior recipient) — address poisoning; (c) the recipient has zero activity on Polygon (active only on Ethereum/Arbitrum); (d) the recipient is a contract without receive/erc20-receiver and was paused/migrated to v2 in 2022 — deprecated. Expect every heuristic (H1-H5) to fire.
